name: niu-image-gen
description: Big-Molecule-maintained derivative of Niu Image Gen for third-party image generation, editing, and batch workflows.

interface.shortDescription: AI image generation with batch mode, quality & ratio selection.
interface.longDescription: Generate and edit images through a third-party API. Includes quality and aspect-ratio controls, local configuration, batch generation, and concurrent processing. This is a maintained derivative of BORAWONG's original plugin.
defaultPrompt: I want to generate some images
